mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, owner_uid, ref_project_id, ref_devops_id, change_name, change_time, change_branch, current_step, current_status, schedule_time, version, remark, try_times, last_commit_id, lock_status, flow_walked
mapper.select:
select
from dm_project_change where owner_uid = #{param.ownerUid} and ref_project_id = #{param.projectId} and change_name like concat('%',#{param.searchKeywords},'%') order by change_time desc

select
from dm_project_change where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and id = #{changeId}
select count(*) from dm_project_change where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and ref_devops_id = #{devopsId} and lock_status = 0
select count(*) from dm_project_change where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and ref_project_id = #{projectId} and lock_status = 0

select
from dm_project_change where current_status = 'READY' and (#{date} >= schedule_time or schedule_time is null) order by schedule_time asc limit ${limit}
mapper.update: update dm_project_change set schedule_time = now(), version = version + 1 where id = #{changeId} and version = #{version}
update dm_project_change set schedule_time = now(), version = version + 1, try_times = try_times + 1, remark = #{remark} where id = #{changeId} and version = #{version}

update dm_project_change set schedule_time = now(), version = version + 1, remark = #{remark}, current_status= #{toStatus, javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.project.ProjectChangeStatus} where id = #{changeId} and version = #{version}

update dm_project_change set schedule_time = now(), version = version + 1, try_times = 0, remark = #{remark}, current_step = #{toStep, javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.project.ProjectChangeStep} where id = #{changeId} and version = #{version}
update dm_project_change set version = version + 1, lock_status = 1 where id = #{changeId} and version = #{version}
mapper.select:
select
from dm_project_change where ref_project_id = #{refProjectId} and ref_devops_id = #{refDevopsId} and lock_status = 0
